name: Mexican Loaf
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Green chiles, drained and chopped
Double the amount if using chunks instead of burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease two 2-pound loaf pans.
3. Melt butter in a large frying pan and sauté garlic.
4. Crumble the vegetable burgers into the sauté and stir well.
5. Add the corn, chiles, chili powder, salt, and pepper to the sauté and stir well.
6. In a separate bowl, whisk together the tomato sauce, cornmeal, and eggs until smooth.
7. Remove this mixture from heat and add it to the pan, stirring thoroughly.
8. Mix everything well, then spoon the mixture into the prepared pans.
9. Place the pans in a large tray of water and bake for 1 hour.
Good source of protein, vitamin A, and C.
